title: AI Video Creation for Everyone (Lunatechs × Berkeley Club Hong Kong × OpenClaw Asia)
location: The Hive · Causeway Bay, Hong Kong
summary: One night. Six creators. The AI video tools that used to need a studio — now on your laptop. Co-hosted with Berkeley Club Hong Kong and OpenClaw Asia at The Hive Causeway Bay.

title: AI Vibe Coding with DeepSeek × OpenCode
location: Drop By Dough, Central, Hong Kong
summary: Our first session at new venue partner Drop By Dough — first-timers next to seasoned devs, vibe-coding with DeepSeek and OpenCode. Free tokens, starter guides for beginners, and working apps that didn't exist that morning.

title: Lunatechs Workshop: AI & Trading
location: Compass Offices, Causeway Bay, Hong Kong
summary: A great night of making new friends, reconnecting with old ones, and learning together how to use AI today to level up your stock trading workflow. Four superstar speakers brought down the house.

title: Boba and Tech: Vibe Coding 101 (Build Your Own Website)
summary: Saturday afternoon at the Chatime courtyard — laptops out, Cursor open, builders shipping their first website from scratch. No engineering background required.

title: Boba and Tech: Vibe Coding 101 (Build Your First App)
summary: Casual drop-in Boba & Tech night at Central Market. Laptops out, Cursor open, first-time coders prompting their way to a working Note-Taking App. Co-hosted with The Berkeley Club of Hong Kong.

title: OpenClaw LIVE: AI joins your TEAM!
location: Hong Kong Island (venue revealed on registration)
summary: AI isn't just a tool anymore — it's a teammate. See how OpenClaw integrates into real team workflows, step into a live WhatsApp group chat with AI collaboration, and catch the debut of Vidiot, an AI video editing project.

title: Boba and Tech: Claude Code Community Day
summary: ~40 builders took over Central Market for a casual Saturday of hacking and sharing projects. A 15-year-old showed up solo to demo his hackathon-winning game, and Mattin brought a chopstick-powered robot.

title: OpenClaw Forum HK: From AI Chat to AI Agent
location: Hong Kong Island (venue revealed on registration)
summary: Small-scale forum exploring how AI is evolving from chat to agents that execute tasks and automate workflows. Co-hosted with OpenClaw Asia, sponsored by HashKey Exchange.

title: Boba & Tech: FREE OpenClaw Setup
summary: Casual setup session at Central Market. Attendees got OpenClaw installed on their laptops with one-on-one help from Hanley and Jason.

title: Tech and Hike: Golden Hour at Victoria Peak
summary: Builders, founders, and tech lovers hiked to Victoria Peak for golden hour. A beginner-friendly 60-minute hike balancing mind, body, and soul.

title: OpenClaw LIVE DEMO — Life on Easy Mode
summary: 100 people packed Compass offices for 4 live OpenClaw demos. Co-hosted with Berkeley Club Hong Kong. Jollibee chicken, 3 lucky draws, and standing room only.

title: Boba and Tech: Great Presentations
summary: Learning how to make great presentations with and without AI. Casual hangout at Central Market over boba.

title: CLAW BITES — Beginner Friendly OpenClaw Workshop
summary: 35 people showed up in the rain to learn OpenClaw hands-on. Two talks, a battle-royale lucky draw, and guest influencers with 700K+ combined following.

title: OpenClaw Office Hours — The First Meetup
summary: Where it all started. An informal hangout at Central Market — talk tech, AI, or anything. Hanley and Jason helped people get hands-on with OpenClaw.
